title: Luffy Strikes Back
description: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You guys did an amazing job!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: EAT! Drink! Spend it however you want!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Who dares to attack the franks!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Give the money back to you?

dialogue.speaker: Franky Family
dialogue.text: He's a weak piece of crap...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: play with him if you like, guys.

summary: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
